feedback.text: Hello, I am an EU citizen from Portugal that have purchased a lot of videogames for not only amusement but education and brain health. These digital products, though, have been suffering a systematic purge when getting older by the big publishers and developers as a mean of programmed obsolescence and forcing consuming of new titles. I have already signed the EU petition for the Stop Killing Games Campaign, so the idea is similar. I would like some provision in the law that would allow me to ensure the products I purchased to keep being valid, and that does not requires much effort from the publisher/developer. I purchase products specially on the Steam platform for PC computers and my Steam Deck.
